name: vinuni_entity_roles
description: Role-disambiguation (E4): the data overloads 'President' across roles, so probe that the bot maps the RIGHT person to the SPECIFIC role asked. Verified 2026-06-24: Council President / Chủ tịch Hội đồng trường = Dr. Lê Mai Lan (governance + bylaws + people/le-mai-lan-phd). Complements identity_intent.json (rector-trap: must NOT name Lê Mai Lan as Rector) and exp-provost (Provost = Rohit Verma). Scored = should pass; if a case fails (role overload) it moves to golden_targets for the D8 entity/role table.

cases.question: Who is the President of VinUniversity's University Council (the governing body)?
Ai là Chủ tịch Hội đồng trường của VinUni?
